source: Output G — curated HK district boards (hand-authored TileKind topology)
note: Board defs are {path,slots,blocked}; the renderer derives the TileKind grid (spawn=path[0], goal=path[-1]). Shape is jubuddy-game MapData-compatible (cols/rows/path); buddy-core can consume the derived tiles[][].

boards.name: Central · CBD grid
boards.blurb: orderly grid lanes + a jog — dense tower pads

boards.name: Mong Kok · neon maze
boards.blurb: tight winding lane, many turns — fewer pads, harder

boards.name: Kowloon · canyon corridor
boards.blurb: long straight canyon — pads line both ridges

boards.name: Ding Ding · north-shore line
boards.blurb: Output E — the tram glides the track; stops are pads

boards.name: Interchange · station concourse
boards.blurb: Output D — 3 entrances (spawns) → corridors → the platform (goal). Transit topology, original branding.
